task_description: Search for the current GDP of Japan and South Korea, then calculate the ratio and analyze which economy grew faster in the last decade.
expected_answer: Japan GDP ~$4.2T, South Korea ~$1.7T. Ratio ~2.5:1. South Korea grew faster (~3-4% avg vs Japan ~1%).

task_description: Find the top 3 most-cited papers on transformer architectures, summarize their key contributions, and identify common themes.
expected_answer: Attention Is All You Need (self-attention), BERT (bidirectional pretraining), GPT (autoregressive pretraining). Common: attention mechanisms, transfer learning.

task_description: Look up the current exchange rates for USD/EUR, USD/JPY, and EUR/JPY. Verify if the cross-rate is consistent (no triangular arbitrage opportunity).
expected_answer: USD/EUR × EUR/JPY should approximately equal USD/JPY. Small discrepancies exist but are within transaction cost margins.

task_description: Search for Python's asyncio documentation, then write a function that fetches 5 URLs concurrently and returns their response times, sorted fastest to slowest.
expected_answer: async def fetch_all(urls): use asyncio.gather with aiohttp sessions, measure time per request, sort by elapsed time.

task_description: Find the population growth rates of India and China over the last 20 years. Project when India's population will surpass China's (if not already).
expected_answer: India surpassed China around 2023. India growth ~1.0%/yr declining, China ~0.3% and now negative.

task_description: Search for the latest IPCC report summary, extract the key temperature projections, and calculate the emission reduction needed to stay below 1.5°C.
expected_answer: Need ~45% reduction from 2010 levels by 2030, net-zero by 2050. Current trajectory: 2.5-3°C by 2100.

task_description: Find three open-source alternatives to Redis, compare their performance characteristics, and recommend one for a write-heavy workload with 10M keys.
expected_answer: KeyDB (multithreaded Redis fork), Dragonfly (multi-threaded), Garnet (.NET). For write-heavy: KeyDB or Dragonfly for multi-threaded write performance.

task_description: Search for the nutritional content of a Big Mac in 5 different countries. Analyze the calorie differences and hypothesize reasons.
expected_answer: Varies 490-560 kcal depending on country. Differences due to: portion size, ingredient sourcing, local regulations, recipe adaptations.

task_description: Look up the sorting algorithm time complexities, then analyze which algorithm would be best for sorting 1M nearly-sorted integers and explain why.
expected_answer: Timsort (Python's default) — O(n) for nearly sorted data. Insertion sort also O(n) but Timsort handles mixed runs better at scale.

task_description: Find the current interest rates of the Federal Reserve, ECB, and Bank of Japan. Explain the carry trade implications between USD/JPY.
expected_answer: Fed ~5.25-5.5%, ECB ~4.5%, BoJ ~0-0.1%. Large USD-JPY rate differential incentivizes borrowing yen to invest in USD assets (carry trade).

task_description: Search for the latest benchmarks comparing GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini on coding tasks. Summarize which model excels in which areas.
expected_answer: Performance varies by benchmark. Generally competitive across HumanEval, MBPP. Differences in long-context handling, instruction following, and reasoning depth.

task_description: Find the earthquake magnitude scale definitions, then classify 5 historical earthquakes by their impact level and explain the logarithmic relationship.
expected_answer: Richter/moment magnitude is log10. Each whole number = 10x amplitude, ~31.6x energy. Examples: 2011 Tohoku (9.1), 2010 Haiti (7.0), etc.

task_description:
Search for Docker best practices, then review this Dockerfile and suggest 3 improvements: FROM ubuntu:latest
RUN apt-get update
COPY . /app
RUN pip install -r /app/requirements.txt
CMD python /app/main.py
expected_answer: 1. Use specific tag (not :latest). 2. Combine RUN layers, add apt-get clean. 3. Use multi-stage build or slim base. 4. COPY requirements first for cache. 5. Use ENTRYPOINT.

task_description: Look up the CAP theorem, then analyze whether MongoDB, Cassandra, and PostgreSQL prioritize C, A, or P, and explain the trade-offs for an e-commerce platform.
expected_answer: MongoDB: CP (consistency + partition tolerance). Cassandra: AP (availability + partition tolerance). PostgreSQL: CA (single node). E-commerce: needs consistency for orders (CP/CA).

task_description: Search for the history of Moore's Law, find current transistor counts for the latest chips, and assess whether the law still holds.
expected_answer: Moore's Law: transistor count doubles ~2 years. Latest chips: >100B transistors. Pace has slowed but continues through architectural innovations (3D stacking, chiplets).
